word: H1610 - גַּף - gaph - gaf - Highest places

sections.paragraph:
Original: גּף

Transliteration: gaph

Phonetic: gaf

BDB Definition:

  1. body, self (only in phrase, eg by himself)
  2. height, elevation

Origin: from an unused root meaning to arch

TWOT entry: 373a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
